title: plagius aureus
side_effects: Plagius aureus can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, headaches, and dizziness due to its toxic properties. Consuming large quantities of the plant's extracts can also lead to vomiting, diarrhea, and stomach cramps. In severe cases, prolonged use of Plagius aureus can cause liver and kidney damage, as well as cardiovascular problems. Additionally, improper use of the plant can also lead to allergic reactions, such as skin irritation and respiratory issues.
